zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Erskine於大約1345年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，她的父親Robert Erskine36歲，母親Christian Menteih Of Arran41歲。她於大約1394年與Alexander Graham在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1409年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Erskine于大约1345年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾时，她的父亲Robert Erskine36岁，母亲Christian Menteih Of Arran41岁。她于大约1394年与Alexander Graham在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1409年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Erskine was born about 1345, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Erskine, was 36 and her mother, Christian Menteih Of Arran, was 41. She married Alexander Graham about 1394, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1409, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Erskine est née environ 1345, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Erskine, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Christian Menteih Of Arran, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Graham environ 1394, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1409, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Erskine um 1345 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Erskine 36 und ihre Mutter Christian Menteih Of Arran 41. Sie hat um 1394 in Scotland Alexander Graham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1409 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Erskine è nata il circa 1345 nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Erskine, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Christian Menteih Of Arran, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Graham circa 1394, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1409, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Erskineが約1345年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父Robert Erskineは36歳，母Christian Menteih Of Arranは41歳であった。約1394年にスコットランドでAlexander Grahamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1409年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Erskine(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Erskine(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Menteih Of Arran(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1394년 스컷랜드에서 Alexander Graham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Erskine nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Erskine, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Christian Menteih Of Arran, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Graham aproximadamente 1394, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1409, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Erskine родилась около 1345 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Erskine было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Menteih Of Arran, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Graham около 1394 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1409 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Erskine nació aproximadamente 1345, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Erskine, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Christian Menteih Of Arran, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Alexander Graham aproximadamente 1394, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1409, en su pueblo.
